EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IProjectedCoordinateSystem

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control the properties and methods for all projected coordinate systems.

[Guid("F94E4C00-1DD1-11B2-BF4E-08002022F573")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IProjectedCoordinateSystem : ISpatialReference, ISpatialReferenceInfo

string

The azimuth of a projected coordinate system.

double Azimuth { get; set; }

Remarks

<P>The <STRONG>IClone::IsIdentical</STRONG> method is not implemented. </P>

Projection

The map projection of a projected coordinate system.

IProjection Projection { get; }

Property Value

IProjection

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>A Projection object encapsulates the mathematics needed to convert geographic coordinates between two different coordinate systems. A projection is a component of a projected coordinate system and is not usually used directly. Rather, a projected cooordinate system is defined and used to project cooordinates.</P>

Remarks 

string Remarks { get; }

Property Value

string

ScaleFactor

The scale factor (K0) of a projected coordinate system.

double ScaleFactor { get; set; }

double
